name: Dan Abnett
bio: British novelist and comics writer. Long-running Black Library author; Eisenhorn, Ravenor, Gaunt's Ghosts, and Horus Rising are among his Warhammer 40,000 anchors.

name: Guy Haley
bio: British science-fiction and fantasy author. Black Library novelist; Dark Imperium, Belisarius Cawl: The Great Work, and several Horus Heresy / Siege of Terra entries.
